title: Disconnect after write is unknown and never replayed

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
The adapter records write boundaries and can lose the bound channel after the first ATX write without a complete receipt.
The harness provisions each linked tool call with its valid owned session, required capability, and a separately captured fresh observation when the handler consumes one.

fault_script.action: For each linked tool, disconnect after its downstream request write and before acknowledgement.
fault_script.expected_effect: Each call is unknown, closes its gate, and is never automatically replayed.

steps.expect: unknown with inspect-device-state-before-retry guidance and exactly one admitted sequence.
unknown for jetkvm_display_capture after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.
unknown for jetkvm_display_status after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.
unknown for jetkvm_input_keyboard after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.
unknown for jetkvm_input_mouse after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.
unknown for jetkvm_input_paste after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.
unknown for jetkvm_input_release after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.
unknown for jetkvm_power_control after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.
unknown for jetkvm_session_connect after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.
unknown for jetkvm_session_reconnect after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.
unknown for jetkvm_session_status after downstream write and before acknowledgement, with the gate closed and zero replay.

pass.assertion: Disconnect after a possible write is unknown, closes the mutation gate, and performs zero replay writes.

evidence.source: The linked focused assertion and ordered fake, replay, or live event record.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

restore.action: Restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline using the reviewed fixture procedure while retaining the device lease.
restore.assertion: The baseline ATX-observable state is proven before the next story starts.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
